metadata.description: Scrapbook of future feature ideas and business expansions for Three Daughters Landscaping

features.name: AI Landscape Design Tool
features.description: Client-facing AI tool that enables customers to submit pictures of their flower beds and receive AI-generated landscaping design recommendations

workflow: Client uploads photo of flower bed
Proprietary AI processes image and generates design options
Sales rep scheduled to visit and confirm scope
Design validated and approved before work begins
technical_requirements: AI/ML model for landscape design (computer vision + design generation)
Quote generation system tied to AI recommendations
implementation_details.business_impact: Streamlines lead qualification, accelerates sales cycle, improves customer experience with instant visualizations

features.name: AI-Powered Crew Routing & Planning
features.description: Intelligent agent that optimizes daily crew routes and work planning using real-time feedback from service visits

workflow: Crew provides real-time feedback during service visits
AI agent processes feedback and historical service data
Routes are optimized for efficiency based on geographic data
Next-day work schedules are automatically optimized
Goals and priorities set dynamically based on data
technical_requirements: Historical service database with location and time data
Mobile app for crew feedback submission
implementation_details.business_impact: Improves crew efficiency, reduces travel time, maximizes billable hours, enables better day-to-day planning

future_roadmap.phase_4: Mobile crew app with real-time feedback

notes: These ideas represent John's vision for transforming Three Daughters from a service provider into a tech-enabled landscaping company. Start with AI landscape design as it has direct customer impact and faster ROI.
